name: W&T OFFSHORE INC
summary: W&T Offshore Inc. (WTI) is an independent oil and natural gas company engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and production of hydrocarbons. The company operates primarily in the Gulf of Mexico, focusing on offshore drilling and production activities. W&T Offshore produces crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids from its Gulf of Mexico properties.
